scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,edge,web -c cyan,magenta,green "npm run dev -w @natt-pundit/txline-gateway" "npm run dev -w @natt-pundit/edge-api" "npm run dev -w @natt-pundit/web"
scripts.build: node scripts/ensure-edge-engine.mjs && npm run build -w @natt-pundit/contracts && npm run build -w @natt-pundit/natt-core && npm run build -w @natt-pundit/natt-edge-engine && npm run build -w @natt-pundit/txline-gateway && npm run build -w @natt-pundit/edge-api && npm run build -w @natt-pundit/commentary-service && npm run build -w @natt-pundit/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @natt-pundit/natt-core && npm run test -w @natt-pundit/edge-api && npm run test -w @natt-pundit/txline-gateway && npm run test -w @natt-pundit/web && npm run test -w @natt-pundit/mcp
